Description:
Epic Name: Foundation / Repo / CI
Establish monorepo, Dockerized env, and CI baselines to build/test and publish images.

Epic Name: Auth & Users
Secure email/password auth with JWT and basic RBAC.

Epic Name: Listings & Units
CRUD and search for listings and units with validation and indexes.

Epic Name: Availability & Holds
Per-unit calendars and time-boxed holds with TTL and expiry.

Epic Name: Booking Flow
Confirm booking via consumed holds and mock payment.

Epic Name: Admin Minimal
Approve listings and view bookings.

Epic Name: Frontend SPA
React+TS app with routing, auth, listings, search, and UX basics.

Epic Name: Testing & Quality
Test harnesses, coverage, lint/format, and e2e.

Epic Name: Observability Basics
Structured logging, ProblemDetails, health checks, correlation IDs.

Epic Name: Seed & Fixtures
Seed data and fixtures to demo flows and support tests.
Create repo structure; add README, editorconfig, CODEOWNERS; enable C# nullable, analyzers, and TS strict.

Summary: Docker Compose for Postgres and app stubs
Description: Compose services for Postgres 16, backend, frontend; volumes and healthchecks; .env.sample and README run steps.
Record decision drivers, options, decision, consequences; link from README.
Implement EF models and migrations for User/Role/Listing/Unit; enable migration pipeline.

Summary: GitHub Actions build test and image
Description: PR: build+tests; main: build+tests+docker push; badges in README.

Summary: User & Role tables with Admin seed
Description: Create tables and seed Admin user with secure password.

Summary: JWT auth register and login endpoints
Description: Email/password register/login; PBKDF2/BCrypt hashing; JWT with role claims.
Attribute-based authorization; restrict Host/Admin operations.
Entities, EF configurations, repositories with CRUD; unit tests.
Create/read/update/delete listings and units; validate photoUrls as URLs.

Summary: Search API for location dates guests type
Description: GET /search with filters; add indexes for city,type,guests.

Summary: React scaffold with Vite routing and UI kit
Description: Scaffold React TS app with routing/layout and axios client; smoke tests.

Summary: Auth pages register login and token storage
Description: Forms with validation; store JWT; logout.
Pages for listing list/create/edit with validation and live refresh.
Friendly empty states and ProblemDetails-to-toast mapping.

Summary: Observability global error handler and health checks
Description: Serilog structured logging; ProblemDetails middleware; /health endpoint.
Expose Swagger UI; export collection under /docs/api; publish as CI artifact.
xUnit unit+integration setup; run ephemeral Postgres; sample tests for auth and listings.

Summary: Frontend testing baseline with Jest RTL
Description: Configure Jest/RTL; add smoke test for listings page; report coverage.
Seed Hosts/Admin/Listings/Units; fixtures for tests; CLI seed command.
Provide .env.sample and secret guidance; ports and JWT secret.
Create UnitCalendar and Hold tables; EF config and seed blocks.
GET /units/{id}/availability returns per-day status; validate date ranges.
POST /holds validates overlaps and creates hold in serializable transaction; sets expiresAt.

Summary: Expire holds background job Asia Dubai
Description: Background job every minute to expire holds and free days; logs in Asia/Dubai.
Create Booking table with fields and constraints; seed one booking.
POST /bookings/confirm consumes active hold; prevents overlap; writes booking.

Summary: Admin approve listing and view bookings
Description: Admin UI to approve listings and view bookings with filters.
Calendar component showing open/blocked/booked; date selection.

Summary: FE hold flow and countdown UI
Description: Initiate hold from calendar; show countdown; cancel hold.

Summary: FE booking confirmation page and receipt
Description: Display booking summary and printable receipt after confirmation.
Tests for overlapping holds/bookings and concurrent requests.
E2E scenario from search to booking confirmation in CI.
Map backend errors to FE toasts; add correlation id to logs and responses.

Summary: README end-to-end setup and demo script
Description: Document full setup and a demo script to showcase flows.
Configure coverage thresholds for backend domain/services and FE components; fail CI when below.
